step.title: Load test plan and change request
step.action: Load existing test plan and review its current structure and coverage targets.
Load change request and extract the specific changes required.

step.title: Analyze change impact
step.action: Analyze impact of changes on test strategy and coverage goals.
Identify which components, test levels, and coverage areas are affected.

step.title: Identify sections to update
step.action: Identify specific sections of the test plan that need updating.
Flag any sections where changes may conflict with existing strategy.

step.title: Revise affected sections
step.action: Revise affected sections while maintaining consistency with unchanged parts.
Ensure traceability links remain valid after revisions.

step.title: Update coverage targets
step.action: Update coverage targets if scope has changed.
Document previous vs new targets for transparency.

step.title: Produce revision report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with revision details.
